name: Physics Cards
description: Draggable cards with spring physics, 3D perspective tilt that follows cursor, and dynamic light reflection. Combines framer-motion drag with CSS 3D transforms.

embedded.description: When true, renders only the card grid without the section wrapper

conflicts: drag constraints are hardcoded — may not fit all layouts
usage_tip: Good for draggable feature showcases; requires framer-motion dependency.
